programme.title: AIRA EPS 16
programme.desc: Aira was at the peak of happiness as she prepared to welcome her wedding day with her beloved, Adrian. However, one day before the big day, a request from her superior, Haris, forced her to return to the office to send a forgotten email. That decision became the starting point of a tragedy that changed Aira's life forever.

programme.title: SEINDAH CINTA MUTIARA 28
programme.desc: It tells the story of Mutiara, who must struggle hard in order to live a decent life. However, problems keep coming one after another, forcing Mutiara to become even stronger to survive them. There are even people around her who are always cruel and hateful toward her. Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: RAHASIA DAN CINTA 5
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent business tycoon, is arranged to marry Greg. The two are brought together because their fathers want to merge their companies. Dwita's father knows that she will most likely reject this plan. Therefore, he provides her with a new facility—a bodyguard named Debu. Thus begins the journey of Dwita, Greg, and Debu, as various problems start to arise in Dwita's life.

programme.title: Hitch
programme.desc: A professional dating expert helps men woo the women of their dreams. However, while helping a hapless client, he finds himself challenged by a gossip columnist.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: Smurfette and her friends go to the Forbidden Forest to find a lost village. When the evil wizard Gargamel gets to know of this, he devises a plan to stop the smurfs from discovering the town.

programme.title: Brightburn
programme.desc: Tori and Kyle find a baby boy in a spaceship and adopt him as their own child, Brandon. However, after turning 12, Brandon learns that he has superpowers and begins to use them for sinister purposes.

programme.title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Ben and Zoey find themselves trapped in a series of deadly escape rooms with four others. They try to survive and find a way out as they slowly discover that they have played the game before.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Miles Morales begins his new life as Spider-Man after receiving a spider bite. However, things take a strange twist when he meets alternate versions of himself from other universes.

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: After a mysterious virus wreaks havoc in the United Kingdom, a team of survivors tries to cope with the aftermath of the disaster and find security.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Robert McCall's close friend, Susan Plummer, is killed while investigating a murder-suicide. As a former marine and spy, he leverages his skills and resources to find the culprit and avenge her death.

programme.title: Blade Runner 2049
programme.desc: K, an officer with the Los Angeles Police Department, unearths a secret that could create chaos. He goes in search of a former Blade Runner who has been missing for over three decades.

programme.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
programme.desc: The Mitchells, a dysfunctional family, must fight a robot apocalypse amidst their much-awaited road trip to save humanity.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: When Bugs overstays his welcome, an evil scientist unleashes Gossamer to get rid of him; Daffy Duck and Porky Pig make lousy firefighters.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Sweet victory turns into a nightmare when Sylvester fears he's haunted by Tweety's ghost; Daffy Duck faces off with a pesky piece of gum.

programme.title: Jellystone!
programme.desc: Yogi strikes a deal with Shag Rugg so he can get into Cheese-Is-Us; Augie and the rest of the Jellystone kids try to help Yakky be braver.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: When the Littles go to an orphanage to adopt a new family member, a charming young mouse named Stuart is chosen. While George is initially unwelcoming to his new brother, the family cat, Snowbell, is even less enthusiastic about having a mouse as his "master" and plots to get rid of him. Against these difficulties, Stuart resolves to face them with as much pluck, love and courage as he can muster.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Twins Best and Bester have the power to choose a new body daily and get the chance to experience life in many different ways.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo takes the gang to meet his good friend Lucy Liu at her art gallery in Queens; when one of her large humanoid modern sculptures comes alive and attacks them, the gang and Lucy have a real mystery on their hands.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?
programme.desc: When the gang does brunch with Daphne's longtime friend, famous actor Sean Astin, the only mystery on their mind is how to split the check, but their attempts to return a lost set of keys quickly lead them into a genuine mystery.

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: Fred and the gang help with a mystery involving a figure from Fred's past; Fred's old childhood friend has also arrived with her gang.

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: The gang is forced to compete against a rival team led by one of Fred's old friends.

programme.desc: Jet gets jealous when they find a gold, special edition of him.

programme.desc: Jet gets shrunken down and Tutti Bel wants to keep him that way.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: After breaking his leg, Robin is confined to his room and spies on his neighbors through a telescope to learn more about his community.

programme.desc: Control Freak thinks the Titans' humor is too juvenile for their time-slot, so he ages them down to a preschool show.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball has something difficult to tell Penny but he isn't sure how to start, until he and Principal Brown make an unusual pact; they decide to talk to each other's girlfriends about the problems they have.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball

Joining the Special Duties Unit, he and his team, fight to uncover and thwart a plot against Hong Kong’s financial system.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Hilarious Family
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Woori The Virgin
programme.desc: Oh Woori (Im Soo Hyang) vowed to remain a virgin until she marries, and has shied away from romantic relationships in a bid to remain chaste. A terrible mixup takes place during her routine checkup and she is accidentally artificially inseminated!

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT - Season 6

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes
programme.desc: A family of black bears are studied in the forested hills of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Showdown of the Unbeatables
programme.desc: Episode 101 of Showdown of the Unbeatables features BCB Air Cannon vs. Line X coating; an automated paintball turret vs. a worlds record holding slingshot marksman; and the RX Rock Breaker vs. the inpenetrable Brown Safe.

programme.title: Tasting Tasmania
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne joins his foodie friend Amy Luttrell to help cook breakfast for his friends at the Bonorong Wildlife Sanctuary after having a cuddle with some of Tasmania's unique animals. On his way down to Hobart Ben stops off at a boutique, family-owned Stefano Lubiana Winery, which overlooks the picturesque River Derwent.

programme.title: Tasting Tasmania
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne explores the infamous Salamana Market in Hobart where he speaks with local producers about their Fresh Tasmanian Produce. Ben spends his evening enjoying the Hobart nightlife.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess visits Northstar Bison to learn about the small family-run ranch's breeding and processing operation, then prepares her signature smash burger.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Oklahoma, where she takes aim at one of the state's estimated 1.5 million feral hogs.

programme.title: Diamond River Hunters
programme.desc: The rainy season begins and the problems escalate. The team must devise new strategies to safeguard the equipment and prevent it from being washed away by the daily thunderstorms.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake. The only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink. We test fire multiple handguns underwater to see if you can actually penetrate a car windshield and save the victim.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth. We construct a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if you can hit, and explode, the tank with an M1 Garand rifle while perched in a precarious position.

programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cewek Gulali: Dia Yang Bersamaku
programme.desc: Winda, a girl selling cotton candy, is feeling troubled because she has secretly fallen in love with Aris, a man who already has a child. Winda's turmoil grows each day, especially when Aris's child asks if she wants to be their mother. What happens next?

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MINTA HATI DAPAT JANTUNG MINTA PEMBANTU DAPAT JODOH

Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler goes under cover as a sex offender to gain the trust of a serial rapist released from jail, but his cover is blown, putting his life in danger.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives investigate a school shooting that left three students dead and link the rifle used in the killings to a gun store serving as the headquarters of a white supremacist group.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Stabler and CSU technician Millie Vizcarrondo (Paula Garcés) investigate a child's remains found at a construction site and find they belong to one of five boys reported missing 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a series of rapes is linked to a speed-dating service, Benson goes undercover and discovers Mike Jergens (Dean Cain) is the assailant.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An investigation into the near-fatal beating of a 12-year-old boy uncovers a female suspect whose trial becomes about the rights of same-sex parents.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When the accused killer of a teen's mother is released due to lack of evidence, the youth exacts his own justice by killing the man.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an 8-year-old girl is kidnapped on her way home from school, DNA tests on the blood found in the abductor's abandoned van reveal she has leukemia.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the rape and murder of two Arab-American women who were trying to improve relations among different groups.

programme.title: Dateline

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a U.S. senatorial candidate's staffer is run over and killed while crossing the street, the team must determine if it was an accident or a murder than could put others in danger.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A CIA agent who once worked with Sam seeks his help before dying of an apparent suicide; while working under cover, Deeks and Kensi enter a prized poodle in a dog show.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A CIA agent's death leads the team to a group of dangerous Russian agents; Hanna worries a secret will be exposed.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a Chinese woman's daughter is held for ransom by smugglers, the detectives turn to her sister for help.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The son of an outspoken critic becomes the prime suspect when the star of a controversial teen show is raped in her trailer on the set.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate a man whose 12-year-old wife is hospitalized with pregnancy complications, and they learn that he is the leader of a cult.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A professor (Billy Campbell) accused of sexual assault volunteers to submit a DNA sample for testing, but the case turns into a he-said, she-said standoff.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After recovering from being shot during a robbery, Fin returns to the narcotics division to keep a promise he made to locate a missing person.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A gang member is pushed from a rooftop in what appears to be retribution for a sexual assault, but when the assault victim also turns up dead, the detectives realize the case is far more complicated.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A tip leads Benson and Cragen to the body of a 7-year-old boy, missing since 1980, and the detectives think the new information was a ploy to help the suspected killer, on death row for another murder, delay his execution.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Fin investigate the brutal rape and murder of a prostitute, and the prime suspects turn out to be a group of teens suspected of re-enacting a favorite video game.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives discover that a murdered teenage girl was a prostitute and had contracted HIV while working on a pornographic film, which leads them to her killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler struggles to keep his emotions in check as he interrogates a man (Matthew Modine) suspected in the murder of a teenage girl -- a man he once let get away on similar charges.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A mother who reported the statutory rape of her daughter is found murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Voight and the team delve into a cold case in search of clues to solve a shocking new crime; with its focus on buried memories, the case sparks concern for Burgess and Ruzek about Makayla's mental healing.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: As the team closes in on drug kingpin Javier Escano, Voight is forced to lie to his undercover informant Anna to keep her on track; their deteriorating trust threatens an increasingly tenuous operation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: After an explosion rocks the case, the team scrambles to finally take down Escano as everyone nears their breaking point.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Still reeling from the death of informant Anna, Voight faces a new threat as he tries to keep the neighborhood clean; new wrinkles develop in the Upton, Halstead and Voight dynamic; the team gets a new chief.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: When a convicted murderer hijacks a prison van, the team scrambles to find him and the abducted prison guard before it's too late; Burgess questions Ruzek's motives in a case, creating tension between the two.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The team investigates a string of brutal pharmacy robberies, and Halstead connects with one of the victims about their Army careers; Upton suspects there is more to the story and confides in Voight.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A murder pulls rookie officer Dante Torres into his own neighborhood; as Voight and Atwater help him navigate the case and manage tricky personal dynamics with wary neighbors, Torres realizes his life may be forever changed.

The 118 race to the rescue to a renaissance faire; an overbearing boss is poisoned; Athena fears for May's life when she encounters a disturbed young man; Uncle Buck babysits young Jee-Yun as Maddie and Chimney begin house-hunting.

The Santa Ana winds bring in a variety of weirder-than-usual emergencies; a family dog retrieves a severed hand; a young woman sleep-drives into the station; Denny questions Hen and Karen about his biological parents.

A dry thunderstorm rolls over Los Angeles, bringing in a series of lightning strike emergencies for the 118 and leaves a first responder's life hanging in the balance; Chimney get a surprise from a visiting Albert.
As Buck's life hangs in the balance, he dreams of a world where he never became a firefighter, for better and worse.
Despite the case being closed, Bobby is determined to prove his Alcoholics Anonymous sponsor was murdered and bring his killer to justice; Buck struggles with his post-traumatic stress.

The 118 faces emergencies at a spin class and a hair salon; a husband and wife find themselves in a compromising position; Buck discovers new cognitive abilities; Hen and Karen find out Denny has been seeing his biological father.

The 118 race to emergencies at a commercial bakery and a bodybuilding competition; Bobby's annual performance reviews send Chimney to the firefighter academy, where he runs into a familiar face; Eddie's aunt gets involved in his personal life.

programme.title: Framed

programme.title: Raya Sebagai Isteri
programme.desc: Soraya dan Haidar mahu disatukan atas kehendak ibunyu, namun Soraya jadi marah bila Haidar rapat dengan Kalsom. Tetapi sebaliknya Haidar dan Kalsom menyimpan suatu rahsia.

programme.title: Tersuka Tanpa Sengaja
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Syed Arif dan Farhah tanpa bersulam cinta mengundang pelbagai konflik. Ketika hubungan mula serasi, Syed Arif bertemu semula dengan kekasih lamanya, Katrina yang rupanya adik kepada Farhah.

programme.title: Pengantin Lelaki Untuk Cik Gadis

programme.title: Perfect Raya

programme.title: Pernikahan Palsu
